gxio Low-Level IO Device Control API

Detailed Description

The gxio library provides application control of the TILE-Gx IO shims.

The library is designed to provide resource allocation and command queueing with the minimum amount of overhead required for inter-process protection. In particular, this API strongly reflects the hardware MMIO control registers, and fast path operations like sending and receiving packets are implemented entirely in userspace.

Applications can link with the gxio library by specifying the -lgxio compiler flag.

The gxio library provides APIs for many of the TILE-Gx IO shims, including:

  • mPIPE Device API (gxio/mpipe.h) : Control of ethernet devices and packet distribution.

  • mPIPE Ingress and Egress Wrappers : Convenience routines for sending and receiving mPIPE packets.

  • mPIPE Classifier Programs : Routines for configuring the default mPIPE classifier program or loading a custom classifier program.

  • mPIPE Link Management : Routines for managing physical network links.

  • MiCA Device API (gxio/mica.h) : Control of on-chip accelerators for crypto and compression.

  • MiCA PKA Device API (gxio/pka.h) : Control of on-chip accelerators for Public Key Authentication.

  • MiCA PKA TRNG Device API (gxio/pka.h) : Access to on-chip True Random Number Generator.

  • TRIO Device API (gxio/trio.h) : Control of PCIe and StreamIO interfaces.

  • GPIO Device API (gxio/gpio.h) : Control of general-purpose I/O pins.

  • USB Device API (gxio/usb_dev.h) : Control of the USB device interface.


Modules

 mPIPE Device API (gxio/mpipe.h)
 The TILE-Gx mPIPE™ shim provides Ethernet connectivity, packet classification, and packet load balancing services.
 mPIPE Ingress and Egress Wrappers
 Convenience functions for receiving packets from a NotifRing and sending packets via an eDMA ring.
 mPIPE Classifier Programs
 Functions for loading or configuring the mPIPE classifier program.
 mPIPE Link Management
 Functions for manipulating and sensing the state and configuration of physical network links.
 mPIPE Timestamp
 Functions for manipulating the mPIPE timestamping clock.
 TRIO Device API (gxio/trio.h)
 The TILE-Gx TRIO shim provides connections to external devices via PCIe or other transaction IO standards.
 MiCA Device API (gxio/mica.h)
 The MiCA™ (Multicore iMesh Coprocessing Accelerator) shim provides a common front end to various acceleration functions such as crypto or compression.
 MiCA Queue API (gxio/mica_queue.h)
 The MiCA™ (Multicore iMesh Coprocessing Accelerator) shim provides a common front end to various acceleration functions such as crypto or compression.
 MiCA PKA Device API (gxio/pka.h)
 The Public Key Authentication acceleration hardware module provides public key cryptography operations at three levels of complexity:.
 MiCA PKA TRNG Device API (gxio/pka.h)
 Incorporated into the PKA hardware module is a True Random Number Generator (TRNG).
 GPIO Device API (gxio/gpio.h)
 The GPIO shim allows access to the processor's general purpose I/O pins.
 USB Device API (gxio/usb_dev.h)
 The USB shim allows access to the processor's Universal Serial Bus connections.
 gxio Error Codes
 Most gxio_ API calls return 0 on success or a negative error code on failure.
